name: Calendar: Delete Event

description.en: Delete an event from the agent's connected calendar. The call is routed to the correct provider automatically.
description.de: Löscht ein Ereignis aus dem verbundenen Kalender. Die Anfrage wird automatisch an den richtigen Anbieter weitergeleitet.

bot: Use this to cancel an event the user no longer needs. Confirm with the user before executing since deletion is irreversible.

inputs.name: External ID

description.en: The event's external ID from the provider

inputs.bot: The provider's event ID (e.g. Google's event id, or agent-<uuid> for agent-created events).
